title: citrus hystrix subsp. acida
intro: Citrus hystrix subsp. acida, also known as the wild durian, is a species of citrus plant native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its strong citrus scent and bitter taste. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Citrus hystrix subsp. acida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and improve respiratory health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
